title: Stale engine mirror on No-GPU download Pod — LTX installed WITHOUT its GGUF transformer, read INSTALLED
description:
BUG (found live 2026-07-02 during MPI-164 verify, No-GPU download Pod): remoteEngineClient._active is refreshed ONLY by ComfyUIController connect/generation flows. A No-GPU 'download mode' Pod (MPI-88) never runs those (no ComfyUI to connect), so the renderer mirror stayed false for the whole session while the backend was remote-active. Every engine-scoped consumer (modelRegistry syncModelInstalled check universe, MpiModelManager footprint/partial/install set) resolved the LOCAL universe: the LTX install request carried [shared deps + bf16]; the server intersect (MPI-163) dropped the bf16 but never ADDED the GGUF, so the install shipped only the 20.5GB shared set and read INSTALLED — no transformer on the volume. After reconnect the card showed 20.5GB/61.5GB PARTIALLY INSTALLED (numerator = installed shared deps from the VOLUME check, denominator = LOCAL universe incl. the absent 41GB bf16, GGUF excluded from both). Volume probe confirmed: shared deps installed=true, ltx23-transformer-gguf + ComfyUI-GGUF installed=false.

FIX (committed): (1) remoteEngineClient self-heals — subscribes to remote:connection and refresh()es on every edge; (2) MpiModelManager awaitReSync() refreshes the mirror BEFORE reSyncInstalledModels, and the remote:connection handler chains awaitReSync() so the repaint happens after the mirror settles; (3) server-side heal in downloadManager: _withEngineExtraDeps() unions engines[engine].extraDeps back into the request after _filterDepsForEngine (both local + remote paths) — intersect alone cannot heal a wrong-engine request, it only subtracts.

VERIFY (live, needs app restart to load new server code): connect No-GPU Pod, open Models, LTX card must show remote universe (~43.3GB denominator: 20.5 shared + 22.8 GGUF) and PARTIALLY INSTALLED; INSTALL must fetch the GGUF transformer + ComfyUI-GGUF node; after completion card reads INSTALLED and a GPU-Pod generation actually runs. FILES: js/services/remoteEngineClient.js, js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiModelManager/MpiModelManager.js, routes/downloadManager.js. Relates: MPI-163/165 (engine split), MPI-88 (download-mode Pod), MPI-164 (found during its verify).

attention.reason: GGUF install + correct universes live-proven; awaiting explicit user confirm (optionally a GPU-Pod gen) to close.
